title: Outpatient Facility Cleaning MA [Same-Day Turn]
description: Ambulatory & outpatient cleaning across MA. Same-day turnaround, CDC protocols. 22+ yrs, $2M insured. (978) 307-8107
aiSummary: Dory's Cleaning Services Inc. is a Massachusetts-based commercial healthcare facility cleaning company with more than 22 years of hands-on clinical experience. We serve 296 cities across Massachusetts, providing CDC and OSHA compliant environmental cleaning for medical offices, specialty clinics (cardiology, dental, urgent care, dialysis), ambulatory and outpatient facilities, surgery centers, rehabilitation and nursing facilities, assisted living, and healthcare administrative offices. Founded by Jeneva Thomas, MA HIC License #213341, $2,000,000 liability insurance. Services include infection control, ATP testing, terminal cleaning, COVID disinfection, biohazard cleanup, and 24/7 emergency response. Contact: (978) 307-8107 — based in Marlborough, MA 01752.
ogDescription: Ambulatory & outpatient cleaning across MA. Same-day turnaround, CDC protocols. 22+ yrs, $2M insured. (978) 307-8107

schemas.name: Ambulatory & Outpatient
schemas.description: Professional sanitation for ambulatory surgery centers, outpatient clinics, same-day procedure facilities, and urgent care centers across Massachusetts.

mainEntity.name: What does ambulatory and outpatient facility environmental cleaning from Dory's include?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our ambulatory and outpatient cleaning service includes treatment room disinfection, patient intake and discharge area sanitation, waiting room cleaning, restroom sanitation, hard floor care, high-touch surface disinfection, medical equipment exterior cleaning, and post-procedure room turnover. We also handle regulated waste area maintenance and provide compliance documentation for every service visit.

mainEntity.name: How often should an outpatient facility be professionally cleaned?

acceptedAnswer.text: Outpatient facilities typically require daily cleaning with same-day turnover cleaning between procedures. High-volume ambulatory surgery centers and infusion clinics often need multiple cleaning cycles per day. Dory's works with your facility director to design a schedule that aligns with patient flow, procedure schedules, and infection control protocols.

mainEntity.name: What compliance standards does Dory's follow for ambulatory care facilities?

acceptedAnswer.text: Dory's follows OSHA workplace safety standards, CDC environmental infection control guidelines for ambulatory care, EPA-registered disinfectant protocols, AORN-informed cleaning practices for procedural areas, and Massachusetts Department of Public Health regulations. We maintain detailed cleaning logs to support your facility's accreditation and survey readiness.

mainEntity.name: Why is Dory's the right choice for ambulatory and outpatient facility environmental cleaning?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ambulatory and outpatient facilities operate at a fast pace with rapid patient turnover, making infection prevention critical. Dory's exclusively serves healthcare facilities and has over 22 years of experience with the unique demands of outpatient environments. Our staff are trained in between-procedure room turnover, terminal cleaning, and the documentation requirements that ambulatory care accreditation bodies expect.

Professional Ambulatory & Outpatient Sanitation

Ambulatory & Outpatient in Massachusetts

Professional sanitation for ambulatory surgery centers, outpatient clinics, same-day procedure facilities, and urgent care centers across Massachusetts with strict infection control protocols.

Call (978) 307-8107 Schedule Assessment

Ambulatory and outpatient facilities require fast-turnaround sanitation between patients while maintaining the highest infection control standards. Dory's Cleaning Services delivers efficient, thorough cleaning using EPA-registered disinfectants appropriate for high-traffic clinical environments.

We understand the unique challenges of procedure rooms, recovery areas, waiting rooms, and exam spaces that serve multiple patients daily. Our team provides rapid-turnaround sanitation that supports infection prevention and regulatory compliance while keeping your facility running on schedule.

With 22 years of clinical experience, our staff is trained to work efficiently between patient visits and procedures, providing thorough cleaning with minimal disruption to your facility's workflow.

Service Details

What's Included

  • Procedure Room & Recovery Area Sanitation
  • Waiting Room & Reception Cleaning
  • Exam Room Turnaround Disinfection
  • EPA-Registered Disinfectant Protocols
  • High-Touch Surface Treatment
  • Restroom & Staff Area Sanitation
  • Equipment Surface Disinfection
  • Compliance Documentation & Reporting

Ideal For

Ambulatory Surgery Centers Outpatient Clinics Same-Day Procedure Centers Urgent Care Centers Diagnostic Imaging Centers Infusion Centers

Frequently Asked Questions About Ambulatory & Outpatient Facility Environmental Cleaning

Common questions from facility directors and outpatient center administrators.

Our ambulatory and outpatient cleaning service includes treatment room disinfection, patient intake and discharge area sanitation, waiting room cleaning, restroom sanitation, hard floor care, high-touch surface disinfection, medical equipment exterior cleaning, and post-procedure room turnover. We also handle regulated waste area maintenance and provide compliance documentation for every service visit.

Outpatient facilities typically require daily cleaning with same-day turnover cleaning between procedures. High-volume ambulatory surgery centers and infusion clinics often need multiple cleaning cycles per day. Dory's works with your facility director to design a schedule that aligns with patient flow, procedure schedules, and infection control protocols.

Dory's follows OSHA workplace safety standards, CDC environmental infection control guidelines for ambulatory care, EPA-registered disinfectant protocols, AORN-informed cleaning practices for procedural areas, and Massachusetts Department of Public Health regulations. We maintain detailed cleaning logs to support your facility's accreditation and survey readiness.

Ambulatory and outpatient facilities operate at a fast pace with rapid patient turnover, making infection prevention critical. Dory's exclusively serves healthcare facilities and has over 22 years of experience with the unique demands of outpatient environments. Our staff are trained in between-procedure room turnover, terminal cleaning, and the documentation requirements that ambulatory care accreditation bodies expect.
